name: Kreuzberg Kitchen
notes: Good for sourdough, pizza, and large batches.

name: Wedding Confectionary
notes: Best for cakes, cookies, and pastries!

name: Mariendorf Wood-Fired Oven
notes: Bake artisan bread and pizzas with a smoky flavor. Firewood (Apple) provided.

name: Victoria's Deck Oven
notes: Get that perfect crust on your bread and pizza!

name: Delicatessen Confectionary
notes: Bake your next party batch of cookies and pastries here.

name: Mitte Artisan Oven
notes: Ideal for your Artisan bread and pizza creations.

name: Pankow Park Oven
notes: Located beside the park, perfect for pizza parties. Firewood (Oak) provided.

name: Plötzensee Wood-Fired Oven
notes: Bread and Pizzas right by the Lake. Firewood (Beech) provided.

name: Charlottenburg Kitchen
notes: Spacious kitchen with high-temperature oven for the crispiest pizzas and artisan bread.

name: Andy's Puffs and Pastries
notes: Located minutes from the U-Bahn. Great for pastries and cakes. Molds and pans available.

name: Hoffmanns Desserts
notes: Two large ovens available for your next baking project. Utensils and tools provided.

name: Westside Bakery and School
notes: Large space with multiple overs. For pizza parties or lessons.

name: SouthEnd Oven Space
notes: Firewood (Pine) provided. Large parking and outdoor space for pizza parties.
